entries.title: Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
entries.description: A classic guide to writing clean, maintainable code. Essential reading for any developer looking to improve their craft.

entries.title: The Pragmatic Programmer: Your Journey To Mastery
entries.description: Timeless advice and techniques for becoming a better programmer. Covers career development, architectural techniques, and coding practices.

entries.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
entries.description: Deep dive into the principles and trade-offs of data-intensive systems. Covers databases, streaming, batch processing, and more.

entries.title: Out of the Tar Pit
entries.description: Seminal paper on complexity in software. Argues that state and control are the root of complexity and proposes functional/relational approach.

entries.title: Notes on Distributed Systems for Young Bloods
entries.description: Practical introduction to distributed systems concepts. Covers CAP theorem, consensus, replication, and more with clear examples.

entries.title: Latency Numbers Every Programmer Should Know
entries.description: Classic reference showing the scale of latency in computer systems. Helps build intuition about performance trade-offs.
